column1: # The ONLY required blocks are [agent] (just a name) and [settings].
# Everything else falls back to gasman.ini - the ini wins when omitted.
# OPTIONAL blocks/keys (all default from gasman.ini if left out):
#   [patient] weight_kg  - patient weight in kg. Also sets the allometric
#                          breath-interval (DT) unless dt_ms is given below.
#                          Omit for the weight-derived allometric value
#                          (~6000 ms at 70 kg). This is the per-breath step;
#                          the model is validated around it - finer is not
#   [volumes] vrg fat ven alv mus  - compartment volumes (litres)
#   [flows]   vrg fat mus          - blood-flow fractions of cardiac output
#             bottleSize bottleCost - per-agent constants. Taken from the
#                          agent's own gasman.ini section when omitted.
#   del     - vaporiser dial / delivered % for the agent
